563.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(2) to detect FuncDef is unreliable and doesn't follow the grammar; may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException or misclassification]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(2) to detect FuncDef is unreliable and doesn't follow the grammar; may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException or misclassification]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: assumes main function starts with 'int main(' but doesn't verify the actual tokens; may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when fewer than 3 tokens remain]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when fewer than 3 tokens remain; also logic is incorrect - FuncDef starts with type keyword, not necessarily followed by LPARENT at offset 2]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(2) to detect function definitions is unreliable and doesn't follow the grammar. Decl can be followed by FuncDef or MainFuncDef, but this check may break on valid declarations or miss function definitions.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(2) to detect function definitions is unreliable and doesn't follow the grammar. Decl can start with 'const', 'int', or 'char', while FuncDef starts with a FuncType ('void', 'int', 'char') followed by an identifier and '('. This check may skip valid declarations or incorrectly break.]

570.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(1) to detect MainFuncDef is unreliable; should check current token for 'int' followed by 'main', not just MAINTK in next position]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(1) to detect MainFuncDef is unreliable; should check current token for 'int' followed by 'main', not just MAINTK in next position]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: assumes main function is preceded by exactly one token ('int'), but doesn't verify it's actually 'int main()'; may skip valid FuncDefs or fail to detect MainFuncDef properly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when only 1 token remains; also incorrect logic - MainFuncDef starts with 'int main', so should check current token for INTTK and next for MAINTK]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(1) to detect main function is fragile. According to grammar, MainFuncDef starts with 'int main()', so should check for INTTK followed by MAINTK, not just MAINTK at position 1. This may incorrectly break parsing of valid FuncDefs.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using ahead(1) to detect main function is fragile. MainFuncDef must start with 'int main()', but this only checks the next token after current position, which may not be accurate after parsing FuncDefs. Should instead check for 'int' followed by 'main' and '(' explicitly.]
